raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The California Works and Recovery Act, AB 1842, is designed to help local communities create jobs through infrastructure projects.",
    "The California Works and Recovery Act seeks to ensure adequate healthcare workforces in high shortage areas.",
    "The California Works and Recovery Act aims to fund wildfire mitigation efforts.",
    "The California Works and Recovery Act will expand the California Competes Tax Credit for businesses hit by COVID-19.",
    "The Recovery Act will create jobs and help California emerge with stronger hospitals and wildfire protection than it enjoyed before COVID-19.",
    "AB 1552 aims to clarify, expedite, and streamline the process to recover payment for losses through business interruption insurance.",
    "Speedy resolution of claims for business interruption insurance will help stabilize struggling businesses and retain employees.",
    "Without federal assistance, California and other states will suffer hardship not endured since the Great Depression."
  ]
}
```
